_help: PvE records submitted by guilds. One entry = a guild's best attempt on a boss/difficulty (the site keeps only the best per guild per board). status: 'verified' (video proof reviewed by a maintainer) or 'declared' (guild master's word). Verified entries ALWAYS rank above declared ones regardless of time — see the rules page. timeSeconds = fight duration (or full delve run when the encounter objective is 'clear'); null = kill recorded without a timed run (ranked after timed entries of the same status). firstKill = the guild's very first kill date (progress race).
